quick_reference.logline: When a donor family's star freshman and the brother of the boy he once helped destroy fake a relationship to contain a campus scandal, they uncover an abuse archive that can either save a sister or burn the whole hockey empire down.
quick_reference.genre: Queer Campus Scandal Romance / Enemies to Lovers / Fake Dating
quick_reference.protagonist_snapshot: Ezra weaponizes truth. Cade weaponizes endurance until endurance stops being enough.

adaptation_positioning: A fake-dating campus scandal romance that uses public hearings, donor optics, and buried abuse evidence to convert a quiet emotional source into a short-drama cliffhanger engine.

season_outline.story_premise: Ezra and Cade fake a relationship to contain a viral rumor and protect June, only to uncover evidence connecting Cade's family, the hockey program, and Noah Quinn's buried assault.
season_outline.main_conflict: Cade must decide when to stop surviving and start choosing, while Ezra must decide whether exposure without trust is just another kind of violence.
arc_segments: Launch: collision, fake couple, first archive clues
Rise: chemistry and evidence deepen together
Storm: hearings, coercion, betrayal, and family danger
Payoff: rescue, public proof, institutional collapse, emotional thaw
major_twists: June has been moving evidence before the leads understand the full scale.
Noah returns as a witness, not as a neat forgiveness machine.
Cade's apparent hearing-room betrayal is driven by a threat against June.
The final proof sits on Noah's old helmet-cam card, not the missing flash drive.
season_outline.final_payoff: Daniel, Brennan, and Holt lose narrative control, June gets a path out, and Cade and Ezra become public by choice rather than coercion.

episode_outlines.title: The Collision
episode_outlines.logline: A donor-run collision and a dropped flash drive pull Ezra, Cade, and June into the same crisis.
episode_outlines.core_event: Ezra opens the drive and finds the discipline archive.
episode_outlines.turn: The evidence is bigger than campus gossip.
episode_outlines.end_hook: Ezra sees the archive label on-screen.

episode_outlines.title: Keep Your Story Straight
episode_outlines.logline: June begs for silence while the school escalates the collision into a hearing problem.
episode_outlines.core_event: Holt summons Ezra and Cade.
episode_outlines.turn: Ezra recognizes Cade now needs a better public lie.
episode_outlines.end_hook: Ezra decides leverage is possible.

episode_outlines.title: Say We Lied
episode_outlines.logline: Ezra offers a fake-dating cover in exchange for truth.
episode_outlines.core_event: Cade accepts the deal.
episode_outlines.turn: The romance rumor becomes intentional strategy.
episode_outlines.end_hook: Cade confirms the relationship in public.

episode_outlines.title: Public Enough
episode_outlines.logline: Their first fake date works too well while June disappears.
episode_outlines.core_event: Brock escalates the rumor and June goes missing.
episode_outlines.turn: Ezra finds her in the chapel loft.
episode_outlines.end_hook: June warns him not to trust athletics.

episode_outlines.title: The Wrong Family
episode_outlines.logline: June reveals backup evidence and Daniel Mercer connects Ezra to Noah Quinn.
episode_outlines.core_event: The old assault and present scandal merge.
episode_outlines.turn: Daniel recognizes the Quinn surname.
episode_outlines.end_hook: He names Noah out loud.

episode_outlines.title: Audio Proof
episode_outlines.logline: Ezra makes Cade hear the buried audio from Noah's case.
episode_outlines.core_event: Brennan's silence order becomes evidence.
episode_outlines.turn: Cade understands the school is actively part of the lie.
episode_outlines.end_hook: Brennan threatens Cade's scholarship.

episode_outlines.title: Practice Blood
episode_outlines.logline: Locker-room pressure and anonymous blackmail hit at once.
episode_outlines.core_event: Brock targets Cade and Ezra receives a warning.
episode_outlines.turn: The threat reaches Noah too.
episode_outlines.end_hook: Ezra chooses to dig harder.

episode_outlines.title: Donor Lights
episode_outlines.logline: Cade is ordered to deny the rumor at a gala and instead claims Ezra publicly.
episode_outlines.core_event: The fake couple becomes a visible couple.
episode_outlines.turn: Cade rejects the script written for him.
episode_outlines.end_hook: He takes Ezra's hand on stage.

episode_outlines.title: Almost
episode_outlines.logline: Private care and public residue push the relationship toward a first real break in the act.
episode_outlines.core_event: Ezra tends Cade's injury at dawn.
episode_outlines.turn: June captures the almost-kiss.
episode_outlines.end_hook: The moment becomes evidence.

episode_outlines.title: Off The Record
episode_outlines.logline: The first real kiss lands just before Noah returns.
episode_outlines.core_event: Ezra and Cade finally stop pretending.
episode_outlines.turn: Noah arrives on campus.
episode_outlines.end_hook: History walks back into the story.

episode_outlines.title: The Witness Returns
episode_outlines.logline: Noah tests Cade while the drive vanishes.
episode_outlines.core_event: Noah refuses easy forgiveness.
episode_outlines.turn: The archive disappears before he can review it.
episode_outlines.end_hook: Someone has already stolen their proof.

episode_outlines.title: Conduct Review
episode_outlines.logline: A leaked kiss becomes the school's excuse to suspend Cade.
episode_outlines.core_event: Holt reframes intimacy as institutional liability.
episode_outlines.turn: Tessa traces the leak toward Mercer channels.
episode_outlines.end_hook: The family and the school are openly linked.

episode_outlines.title: Backup Copy
episode_outlines.logline: June escapes injured and reveals the conversion-camp threat.
episode_outlines.core_event: The safehouse becomes necessary.
episode_outlines.turn: Cade admits Daniel had prepared to erase him.
episode_outlines.end_hook: The family threat jumps from emotional to operational.

episode_outlines.title: Safehouse Rules
episode_outlines.logline: Privacy forces honesty before legal pressure finds them.
episode_outlines.core_event: Cade opens up about how obedience was built into him.
episode_outlines.turn: Daniel files kidnapping accusations.
episode_outlines.end_hook: Even the refuge has become unstable.

episode_outlines.title: Take The Deal
episode_outlines.logline: Brennan offers Cade future in exchange for betrayal while Ezra prepares the first public drop.
episode_outlines.core_event: Both leads start making decisions without each other.
episode_outlines.turn: The hearing arrives before trust is repaired.
episode_outlines.end_hook: Cade walks into the hearing compromised.

episode_outlines.title: Say Nothing
episode_outlines.logline: Cade's silence makes Ezra think the betrayal is real until the coercion text is exposed.
episode_outlines.core_event: Holt uses Cade's silence against Ezra.
episode_outlines.turn: Ezra sees the text about June.
episode_outlines.end_hook: The betrayal flips into hostage logic.

episode_outlines.title: Trade Window
episode_outlines.logline: The leads try one coordinated move to get June and the proof clear.
episode_outlines.core_event: Brock corners June near the rink.
episode_outlines.turn: Cade takes the blame to get her out.
episode_outlines.end_hook: The school now has cover to destroy him.

episode_outlines.title: Live Mic
episode_outlines.logline: The trap catches Daniel threatening June on record.
episode_outlines.core_event: June baits Daniel into speaking plainly.
episode_outlines.turn: Ezra finally captures clean audio.
episode_outlines.end_hook: The best proof so far is in his headphones.

episode_outlines.title: Too Early For Love
episode_outlines.logline: The system suppresses proof again and Cade chooses the worst possible time to say he loves Ezra.
episode_outlines.core_event: Holt blocks publication.
episode_outlines.turn: Cade confesses love on the bridge.
episode_outlines.end_hook: Ezra cannot answer.

episode_outlines.title: Freeze
episode_outlines.logline: Ezra publishes without consent, and Daniel drags Cade back into family control.
episode_outlines.core_event: Trust fractures at the same time the truth leaks.
episode_outlines.turn: Cade is pulled home.
episode_outlines.end_hook: June's line goes dark.

episode_outlines.title: Church Steps
episode_outlines.logline: Ezra and Noah arrive at the church property to find Cade bloodied on the steps.
episode_outlines.core_event: Ezra hits Daniel in public.
episode_outlines.turn: The violence is finally visible to cameras.
episode_outlines.end_hook: They have proof of harm, but not yet control of the narrative.

episode_outlines.title: Altered Footage
episode_outlines.logline: June's legal path opens as Holt releases an edited version of the story.
episode_outlines.core_event: The system makes a last attempt to redefine Cade.
episode_outlines.turn: Noah reveals the hidden helmet-cam card.
episode_outlines.end_hook: A final proof source still exists.

episode_outlines.title: Black Tape
episode_outlines.logline: The team protests and the arena screens turn into a weapon.
episode_outlines.core_event: Noah's old footage goes public during the semifinal.
episode_outlines.turn: The whole building sees the buried assault.
episode_outlines.end_hook: Truth detonates before the finale.

episode_outlines.title: Thaw
episode_outlines.logline: Daniel, Brennan, and Holt lose control while Cade and Ezra finally stop hiding.
episode_outlines.core_event: Public takedown and public kiss land together.
episode_outlines.turn: The final emotional answer comes in quiet after the noise.
episode_outlines.end_hook: Final episode resolves rather than re-hooks.

paywall_map: EP05: Daniel recognizes Ezra as Noah Quinn's brother.
EP10: Ezra and Cade kiss for real, then Noah returns.
EP16: Cade's apparent betrayal flips into coercion once the text is seen.
EP23: The arena scoreboard starts playing the buried truth.
outline_markdown: # 01_英文大纲\n\nFull outline maintained in companion markdown file `01_英文大纲.md`.
